query: Sunken Garden Kensington Palace flowers pond London
want: the formal walled sunken flower garden with tiered flowerbeds around a long central lily pond

query: Hunterian Museum Royal College of Surgeons gallery London
want: a wide gallery hall / specimen-wall view

query: Richmond Park deer parkland oaks London
want: open grassland with deer and ancient oak trees, big sky

want: market buildings, the Camden Lock sign, food stalls / crowds
